children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Apples in less than carload lots as defined by the Secretary may, in his discretion, be shipped to any foreign country without complying with the provisions of this chapter.

children.heading: Bulk containers
children.label: b Bulk containers
children.text: Apples may be shipped to Canada in bulk containers without complying with the provisions of this chapter.
